hero.title: Mysterious Origins
hero.subtitle: The Ninja Sasquatch Games Universe
hero.description: A young Quebec company that breaks the mold to offer you original, fun, and accessible board games for everyone.
hero.mission: Here, we combine creativity, laughter, a touch of mystery, and strong environmental values. Our games are designed to transform your evenings into memorable moments, whether with family or friends.

games.title: Our Creations
games.description: Each game is thoughtfully designed to offer a unique, fun, and environmentally friendly experience.

1.title: Mysterious Origins
1.shortDesc: Dive into the legends of the Sasquatch and uncover its secrets
1.fullDesc: Mysterious Origins transports you into the fascinating world of the Sasquatch. Explore the forests, decode the clues, and unravel the mysteries of this legendary creature. A captivating game that blends strategy and discovery for the whole family.

2.title: Ninja Mission
2.shortDesc: Infiltration, stealth, and tactics to become the ultimate ninja
2.fullDesc: In Ninja Mission, become a master of stealth. Plan your moves, outwit your opponents, and complete your secret objectives. Every decision counts in this strategy game where mystery reigns.

3.title: Forest Feast
3.shortDesc: Guaranteed laughs around a wild and wacky feast
3.fullDesc: Forest Feast turns your evenings into hilarious adventures. Between zany challenges and absurd situations, this party game guarantees unforgettable moments and uncontrollable laughter.

4.title: Guardians of the Forest
4.shortDesc: Work together to protect nature and its inhabitants
4.fullDesc: Guardians of the Forest celebrates our environmental values. Work together to preserve the ecosystem, save the animals, and restore the natural balance. A cooperative game that raises awareness while entertaining.

5.title: Legends of Quebec
5.shortDesc: Explore the myths and fantastic creatures of Quebec
5.fullDesc: Legends of Quebec invites you to discover Quebecois folklore. From the Sasquatch to creatures of local legend, travel the land and collect mythical tales in a unique strategic adventure.

6.title: Mystery Night
6.shortDesc: Investigations and riddles for an evening full of suspense
6.fullDesc: Mystery Night plunges your guests into thrilling investigations. Hidden clues, intriguing suspects, and guaranteed twists for an immersive experience that will leave a lasting impression.

about.title: Our Mission
about.p1: Ninja Sasquatch Games was born from a passion for creating unforgettable moments around the table. We firmly believe that board games have the power to bring people together and create lasting memories.
about.p2: Our environmental commitment is more than a promise: all our games are made with 100% compostable materials. Because having fun should never come at the expense of our planet.
about.p3: Based in Quebec, we draw our inspiration from local legends, mysterious nature, and the spirit of adventure that characterizes our beautiful province.
about.ecoDesc: Every Ninja Sasquatch game is designed with environmental respect, using compostable materials and responsible production.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: A question? A collaboration project? Want to discover our games? Write to us!
